title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services!
